claim: TarPit readout plus bondedness and crystal comparison can be used as a shared derivation metric for natural processes. Each process is assembled as LCR items, decomposed by TarPit/bond metrics, compared against crystal forms, and checked against standard targets.

processes.title: Fine-Structure Constant Literal Metrics
processes.lcr_assembly_rule: Assemble E8 hemisphere roots, boundary half-vignettes, D4 faces, and CODATA target as LCR items.

processes.title: Electroweak/Higgs Mass Residue
processes.lcr_assembly_rule: Assemble VOA weight, two vacua, six excited states, kappa, and measured electroweak masses as LCR items.

processes.title: CKM Bounded Route
processes.lcr_assembly_rule: Assemble the nine CKM magnitudes, three route stages, and S3 orbit as LCR mixing items.

processes.title: Crystal Zoo Bondedness And Phase Signatures
processes.lcr_assembly_rule: Assemble IRL lattice family rows as LCR crystal items and compare bondedness across finite/infinite/ferro/frustrated classes.

processes.title: Chemical Bond Energy Forms
processes.lcr_assembly_rule: Assemble observed bond dissociation energies as LCR bond items and let TarPit/bondedness compare the natural bond family.

components.name: H-H bond energy
components.source: standard chemistry table; attach source before promotion

components.name: C-H bond energy
components.source: standard chemistry table; attach source before promotion

components.name: O-H bond energy
components.source: standard chemistry table; attach source before promotion

components.name: C-C bond energy
components.source: standard chemistry table; attach source before promotion

components.name: C=C bond energy
components.source: standard chemistry table; attach source before promotion

components.name: N-N bond energy
components.source: standard chemistry table; attach source before promotion

components.name: N#N bond energy
components.source: standard chemistry table; attach source before promotion

source_paths: external chemistry source required before promotion

processes.title: Universe-Scale TarPit Tower Aggregate
processes.lcr_assembly_rule: Consume the complete FLCR lift-tower receipt as one universe-scale process: paper towers, slot-family towers, decade towers, total bonds, total triads, and total mass.

processes.title: Waveform Encoding Collapse
processes.lcr_assembly_rule: Assemble waveform samples, centroid, energy, zero-crossing count, and encoding choice as LCR readout items.

target_residuals.name: real_wave_dataset
target_residuals.source: attach public wav corpus or local Barker waveform dataset

processes.title: Beta Decay Topology
processes.lcr_assembly_rule: Assemble parent neutron, daughter proton, electron, antineutrino, Q-value, and lifetime as LCR decay items.

components.name: neutron beta Q value
components.source: local seeded reference; attach PDG/NIST row before promotion

components.name: neutron lifetime
components.source: local seeded reference; attach PDG/NIST row before promotion
